apps.name: TravelBot
apps.subtitle: AI-powered travel companion
apps.localizedDescription:
Slimme reisgenoot met sarcastische routehints, GPS navigatie, spraakherkenning en offline functionaliteit.

Features:
• AI-powered route observaties
• Real-time GPS tracking
• Spraakherkenning en text-to-speech
• Offline kaarten en navigatie
• Mock GPS voor development
• Dark/Light mode
• Multi-language (NL/EN)
• Personas: Heino, Sergio Herman, Neerslachtige Belg

versions.localizedDescription:
TravelBot v4.0 - Complete rebuild!

What's New:
• Complete UI overhaul
• Enhanced AI personas (Heino, Sergio Herman)
• Improved GPS accuracy
• Better offline support
• Mock GPS for testing
• Faster app startup
• Bug fixes and performance improvements
